_comment: Third pass over user-typed items staged in prod catalog_candidates (2026-07-07). Every open candidate that resolved to a real, citable product. Notable: all four suspected test entries (Alpenblow, Igneous NOBO, Tark, Trailbrush) turned out to be real cottage products.

rows.name: Apple Watch Series 6
rows.quote: Weight — 40mm: Aluminum: 30.5g (Apple Watch Series 6 Technical Specifications; Apple doesn't split GPS vs Cellular for aluminum).

rows.name: GigaPower Fuel 110 Gold
rows.quote: Fuel Weight: 3.9oz (110g); full-canister Weight: 7.5oz (212.6g). Net-fuel convention, matching the MSR IsoPro rows. SKU GP-110G; live snowpeak.com URL now 404s, cited from Snow Peak's own archived page.

rows.name: BV ONE Adjustable Bear Canister
rows.quote: Weight: 1.97 lb (1 lb 15 oz / 895 g). 2026 release — first adjustable/telescoping canister (4.65-8.3L, IGBC #255500; not approved for Yosemite/SEKI).

rows.name: SoftBottle
rows.quote: Weight: 1.0 oz. (29 g) — current closure-cap model (part 11530); older push-pull listings show 1.2 oz.

rows.name: Alpenglow Pro Hoody
rows.quote: Weight: 189 g (spec metafield on the live page; the 230-270 g per-size figures in the Shopify variant JSON are shipping weights).

rows.name: Wild Trails Sports Bra
rows.quote: Weight 113 g (4 oz). Live patagonia.com bot-blocks; cited from the archived official product page.

rows.name: Classic Thermal Merino Base Layer Quarter-Zip
rows.quote: The approximate garment weight is 8.32 oz. (236 g) — official REI staff answer in the product Q&A (neither Smartwool nor REI's spec tab publishes a weight); matches a user-measured 236 g.

rows.name: Sinsola Cinch Cap
rows.quote: Weight: 36g / 1.3 oz. A real current product, distinct from the Sinsola Hat.

rows.name: Tempest Jacket
rows.quote: 259 g / 9.1 oz (271 g / 9.6 oz incl. stuff sack) — GORE-TEX rain shell, US #2328313 men's; women's is #2328314. User typed just 'Mont bell tempest'.

rows.name: Fillo Elite
rows.quote: Ultralight (3 ounces!) (85 g) — nemoequipment.com publishes the Elite's weight only in ounces.

rows.name: Aeros Ultralight Pillow
rows.quote: Weight: 55 g / 1.9 oz (Packed Weight: 57 g / 2.0 oz) — Regular size.

rows.name: Lost Ranger 3N1 15F
rows.quote: Total Weight: 2lb 12oz (1247 g); Inner Bag 1lb 3oz, Outer Bag 1lb 9oz — full 3N1 system, Regular. Spec from Big Agnes's company storefront (bigagnes.com renders the same table as an image); Shopify JSON 1261 g likely includes the stuff sack.

rows.name: Tiger Wall UL2 Footprint
rows.quote: Weight: 5oz (142 g) — spec-page footprint weight, not the 168 g Shopify JSON shipping/packed figure.

rows.name: Wide Mouth Ultralite Bottle
rows.quote: 3.75 oz (106.25g) — HDPE Ultralite, distinct from the 177 g Tritan Wide Mouth already cataloged.

rows.name: Tera
rows.quote: Weight: 26.1 g (polarized; sunglasses filed under other, matching the Treeline row).

rows.name: Alpenblow Classic Micro Inflator
rows.quote: Weight: 8.60 g (0.30 oz) — USB-powered sleeping-pad micro inflator; brand is Alpenglow Gear, 'Alpenblow' is the product.

rows.name: NOBO Bottle
rows.quote: Weight: 65 g (spec table; description paragraph says 64 g) — 1L HDPE bottle with Smartwater-compatible 28-410 threads.

rows.name: Tark Titanium Backpacking Trowel
rows.quote: Tark Hybrid Titanium: 16 g — other variants: Compact 10 g, Large 19 g. Brand is Suluk 46 (Canada).

rows.name: Trailbrush
rows.quote: Brush - 0.07 oz (2 g) — brush head that mounts on a titanium spoon/spork handle; sold as 'Trailbrush w/ 5g Colgate Toothpaste'.
